pattern: single Claude marketplace entry points at repo root
value_for_us: Simple top-level package for one broad plugin
caution: One giant plugin makes selective install harder

value_for_us: Good pattern for modular domain bundles
caution: Needs generated copies or drift checks

value_for_us: Supports all-in or narrow install surfaces
caution: Complete bundle should be marked high-review

pattern: Apache-2.0 license declared in repo metadata and marketplace
caution: Still verify nested third-party content if vendoring
Security policy does not prove content accuracy

value_for_us: Useful provenance and dataset citation marker
caution: Citation does not validate regulatory correctness
Index can contain false positives for secret-shaped strings

pattern: plugin descriptions include counts and domains
caution: Counts must be verifier-checked against filesystem

value_for_us: Portable pattern for segmented Claude installs
caution: Minimal metadata lacks repository/license details inside each plugin

value_for_us: Shows need for manifest/readme/count consistency checks
caution: Root manifest said 753 while marketplace/README said 754 in earlier inspection

pattern: no native Codex plugin manifest in repo root
value_for_us: Need conversion layer rather than assuming Claude plugin works in Codex
caution: Codex plugin authority must come from Codex docs

pattern: domain plugin taxonomy maps directly to source-policy categories
value_for_us: Good basis for source scoring and selective allowlists

caution: Too broad for default user install
Our docs should insist on pinned/reviewed installs for community sources

pattern: community marketplace listings can be useful sole-source candidates
value_for_us: Aligns with native-first plus marketplace fallback policy
caution: Only after original repo provenance and runtime review
